glosses.ja: 行方不明の; 消えた

translations.en: We’re looking for the missing cat.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在找那只走失的猫。
translations.yue: 我哋搵緊嗰隻唔見咗嘅貓。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm con mèo bị lạc.
translations.hi: हम खोई हुई बिल्ली को ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter den bortkomne katten.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari kucing yang hilang.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter den försvunna katten.
translations.da: Vi leder efter den forsvundne kat.
translations.ja: いなくなった猫を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun (3rd person singular, impersonal value) functioning as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing a specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Past participle used adjectivally (post-nominal modifier) meaning ‘missing’; agrees with the noun (masculine singular).

sentences.target: Le sac disparu est chez toi.

translations.fr: Le sac disparu est chez toi.
translations.en: The missing bag is at your place.
translations.es: La mochila perdida está en tu casa.
translations.de: Der verschwundene Rucksack ist bei dir.
translations.it: Lo zaino smarrito è a casa tua.
translations.yue: 唔見咗嗰個背囊喺你屋企。
translations.pt: A mochila perdida está na sua casa.
translations.vi: Chiếc ba lô bị mất đang ở nhà bạn.
translations.nl: De verdwenen rugzak is bij jou thuis.
translations.hi: खोया हुआ बैग तुम्हारे घर में है.
translations.el: Το χαμένο σακίδιο είναι στο σπίτι σου.
translations.nb: Den bortkomne sekken er hos deg.
translations.id: Tas yang hilang ada di rumahmu.
translations.sv: Den försvunna ryggsäcken är hos dig.
translations.da: Den forsvundne rygsæk er hos dig.
translations.ja: なくなったリュックはあなたの家にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Adjective (past participle used as adjective) modifying ‘sac’; masculine singular agreement.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular, linking the subject to a prepositional predicate.
Preposition indicating location at someone’s home/place.
Stressed (tonic) 2nd person singular pronoun; object of the preposition ‘chez’.

sentences.target: Ils ont identifié une personne disparue.

translations.fr: Ils ont identifié une personne disparue.
translations.de: Sie haben eine vermisste Person identifiziert.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们确认了一名失踪人员的身份。
translations.yue: 佢哋確認咗一名失踪人士嘅身份。
translations.vi: Họ đã xác định một người mất tích.
translations.nl: Ze hebben een vermiste persoon geïdentificeerd.
translations.hi: उन्होंने एक लापता व्यक्ति की पहचान की.
translations.ja: 彼らは行方不明者を特定しました。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine/mixed); subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; forms the compound past with the following participle.
Past participle of the main lexical verb; part of the compound tense with ‘avoir’; transitive verb. No agreement here since the direct object follows.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing a nonspecific noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the direct object noun phrase.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally) modifying ‘personne’; feminine singular agreement.

sentences.target: Nous attendons des nouvelles de la personne disparue.
sentences.reading: /nu atɑ̃dɔ̃ de nuvɛl də la pɛʁsɔn dispaʁy/

translations.fr: Nous attendons des nouvelles de la personne disparue.
translations.ipa: /nu atɑ̃dɔ̃ de nuvɛl də la pɛʁsɔn dispaʁy/
translations.en: We’re waiting for news about the missing person.
translations.es: Estamos esperando noticias sobre la persona desaparecida.
translations.de: Wir warten auf Neuigkeiten über die vermisste Person.
translations.ko: 실종된 사람에 대한 소식을 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在等待关于失踪者的消息。
translations.yue: 我哋正等緊關於失踪人士嘅消息。
translations.ru: Мы ждём новостей о пропавшем человеке.
translations.pt: Estamos aguardando notícias sobre a pessoa desaparecida.
translations.he: אנחנו מחכים לחדשות על האדם שנעדר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chờ tin tức về người mất tích.
translations.ar: نحن ننتظر أخبارًا عن الشخص المفقود.
translations.nl: We wachten op nieuws over de vermiste persoon.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо новин про зниклу людину.
translations.hu: Várjuk az eltűnt személyről szóló híreket.
translations.hi: हम लापता व्यक्ति के बारे में खबर का इंतजार कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Czekamy na wiadomości o zaginionej osobie.
translations.nb: Vi venter på nyheter om den savnede personen.
translations.id: Kami menunggu kabar tentang orang yang hilang.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på nyheter om den saknade personen.
translations.cs: Čekáme na zprávy o pohřešované osobě.
translations.da: Vi venter på nyt om den savnede person.
translations.ja: 私たちは行方不明者についての知らせを待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Indefinite plural article (contracted form historically from ‘de’ + plural), introducing a nonspecific plural noun.
Common noun, feminine plural (‘news, updates’); head of the direct object noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a complement specifying source/topic (‘of/from’).
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the complement noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘de’.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally) modifying ‘personne’; feminine singular agreement.
